title: Update NodeChannel._on_node_receive to explicitly drop on validation failures with logging/metrics
description: In python/src/lichen/coap/node_channel.py:_on_node_receive, make validation failures (ports, length, checksum, source addr, SCHC classify) explicit drops with structured logging and NodeMetrics.record_error. Ensure malformed sources are dropped per bead.
close_reason: Updated _on_node_receive with explicit validation drops, structured logging, NodeMetrics.record_error for non-SCHC, non-UDP, wrong dst, bad ports/checksum, bad checksum, malformed source; fixed task cleanup in _on_send_done. Unit tests and mypy/ruff pass.
